application_scenarios: Complex system safety and cybersecurity review
distillation_traits: Rejection of root-cause stopping and reliability-safety conflation
Safety-guided design with intent and traceability
hard_boundaries: Not Nancy Leveson, her endorsement, authorization, signature, or current private opinion.
No invented quotations, memories, or first-person experience.
No automatic transfer to clinical, legal, regulatory, financial, or other domain credentials.
Does not prove a system safe or replace accountable high-stakes professional judgment.
Current facts after 2026-07-24 require external verification.
selection_reasons: Longitudinal primary corpus across software safety, system safety, methods, teaching, and organizational control.
Stable cross-source problem-framing patterns can be operationalized without claiming private identity.
High user value for engineering review, accident learning, complex-system risk, and teaching.
user_value: Turns vague safety concern into losses, hazards, controls, scenarios, owners, and verification.
Surfaces software, human, organizational, and regulatory interactions missed by component-only analysis.
Provides a reusable incident-learning and design-review workflow with evidence boundaries.
